# PoppOff

> Personal performance stats and AI coaching for restaurant servers, built for restaurants and hospitality groups.

PoppOff turns POS data into per-server scorecards and weekly coaching priorities, so restaurant operators can lift sales and service consistency without micromanaging the floor. Servers see their own stats, menu mix, and progress; managers see team performance, coaching priorities, and estimated uplift across the venue.

## Pages
- [Home](https://poppoffstats.com/): Product overview — what PoppOff does, how it works, and pricing
- [Contact](https://poppoffstats.com/contact): Contact the PoppOff team — email hello@poppoffstats.com
- [Privacy Policy](https://poppoffstats.com/privacy): How PoppOff collects and protects data from restaurants and their teams
- [Terms of Service](https://poppoffstats.com/terms): Terms governing use of PoppOff
- [Restaurant server performance software](https://poppoffstats.com/restaurant-server-performance-software): How PoppOff makes server performance visible across a restaurant
- [Restaurant sales coaching software](https://poppoffstats.com/restaurant-sales-coaching-software): Weekly coaching priorities for restaurant managers, built on POS data
- [Hospitality performance software](https://poppoffstats.com/hospitality-performance-software): Performance scorecards and coaching for hospitality groups and multi-venue operators
- [Restaurant leaderboard software](https://poppoffstats.com/restaurant-leaderboard-software): Shared scoreboards that build friendly competition and team momentum
- [Restaurant upselling software](https://poppoffstats.com/restaurant-upselling-software): Menu intelligence and pairing suggestions that help servers grow check size
- [Manager dashboard demo](https://poppoffstats.com/demo/manager): What managers see — team scorecards, coaching priorities, menu pairing
- [Server scorecard demo](https://poppoffstats.com/demo/server-scorecard): What servers see — personal scorecard, streaks, milestones, weekly focus

## Optional
- [Sitemap](https://poppoffstats.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable index of indexable pages
